title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides utility assistance (electric, gas, and heating fuel) and water when funding is available. 1317 NE Dustin Court McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Renter and owner-occupied households below 60% of Oregon Statewide Median Income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 687-1480 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-0457 Main phone (855) 216-5289 Toll-free Energy Assistance (503) 687-1480 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to complete the application request form. Calls are processed first-come, first-served. It is strongly advised that households approved for assistance continue to pay their utility bills until the credit from energy assistance appears on their statement. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Completed and signed YCAP Program Services Application (account holder signature preferred) -Copies of Social Security cards from all household members -Documentation of earned income for household members over age 18 and not attending high school, for either the past 30 days, 90 days, or 12 months (pay stubs, child support, unemployment, etc.) -Current year documentation of any Social Security awards received in the household -An original or a copy of all most recent heating and utility bill(s) utilized in the household clearly showing account number, service address, and account holder name (direct purchase receipts for wood require a date, listed amount, vendor name, and address) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Dustin Court is a cul-de-sac that was created for the YCAP building, so many GPS systems do not show this road. Enter "2170 NE Riverside Drive, McMinnville, OR" into a GPS system to get close to the building and from there, it is obvious where the YCAP building is. Without a GPS system: Turn onto SE Riverside Drive from SE Lafayette Road. Once on Riverside Drive, the building is about 200 yards down on the left. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP
